title: Brrr! Washington's Chilliest Day Ever
story: Teeth chattering? Icicles on your nose? That's nothing compared to the bone-chilling cold that gripped Mazama and Winthrop, Washington in 1968. On December 30, temperatures plummeted to an unbelievable -48°F, setting the state record for the coldest day ever. Imagine frozen eyelashes and snowballs that wouldn't melt for days!
activity_question: What temperature did Mazama and Winthrop, Washington reach on December 30, 1968?
follow_up_question: How do you think people stayed warm on such a freezing day?

title: A Mystery Unfolds on Broadway
story: The curtain rose on a thrilling new mystery in 1982. Anthony Shaffer's play 'Whodunnit' made its grand debut on Broadway on December 30. Theatergoers were drawn into a world of suspense and intrigue as they tried to solve the puzzle alongside the characters. Shaffer, known for his clever twists, kept audiences guessing until the very end.
activity_question: What type of play was 'Whodunnit'?
follow_up_question: Have you ever tried to solve a mystery? What clues did you look for?

title: A Musical Sci-Fi Mastermind Is Born
story: Imagine a world where music and science fiction collide! That's the universe of Somtow Sucharitkul, born in Bangkok on December 30, 1952. This talented Thai artist wears two creative hats - he's both a composer and a sci-fi author. Somtow, also known as S. P. Somtow, penned the mind-bending book 'Utopia Hunters', blending his love for futuristic tales with his musical genius.
activity_question: What two creative fields is Somtow Sucharitkul known for?
follow_up_question: Can you think of ways music and science fiction might inspire each other?

title: From Earth to Space: An Astronaut's Journey
story: Daniel T. Barry dreamed big and soared even higher. Born in Norwalk, Connecticut in 1953, he grew up to become an engineer and NASA astronaut. On December 30, Barry's birthday, we celebrate the man who would one day blast off into space on the STS-72 mission. His journey from a small town to the stars shows that with hard work, even the sky isn't the limit!
activity_question: What mission did Daniel T. Barry fly on as a NASA astronaut?
follow_up_question: What skills do you think are important for becoming an astronaut?

title: Astronaut Steven Smith Blasts Off into Life
story: In Phoenix, Arizona, a future space explorer took his first breath. Steven L. Smith was born in 1958, destined for the stars. This baby boy would grow up to become an astronaut, flying on multiple space shuttle missions. On December 30, we celebrate the birth of this cosmic adventurer who'd later zoom through the heavens on STS-68 and STS-82.
activity_question: What space missions did Steven L. Smith fly on?
follow_up_question: What do you think it feels like to be born in one place and later work in outer space?

title: A Comedian's Southern Roots
story: Henry Cho brought laughter to the world when he was born in Knoxville, Tennessee in 1962. This Korean-American comedian's unique background blends Southern charm with Asian heritage. On December 30, Cho entered the scene, destined to tickle funny bones across America with his witty observations and down-home humor.
activity_question: Where was Henry Cho born?
follow_up_question: What makes Henry Cho's background unique for a comedian?
